title: Seoul Night Window
summary: A vertical frame for the moments when the city felt layered and cinematic.
body:
Use the body column for the longer text box on the story detail view.

This is where you can write the narrative, scene description, memory, or observation that should open when someone clicks the tile. Multi-paragraph text is supported here, just like it is on the Connections page.
image_alt: A Seoul street scene at night

title: Shared Language
summary: Landscape tiles are useful for wider environmental photos or scenes with several people in frame.
body: This sample row is linked to both a city and a connection, so the modal can show chips back to the relevant city page and Connections gallery entry.

title: Arrival Detail
summary: Square tiles work well for portraits, signage, objects, or close cropped details.
body: If you do not need an optional connection tag, leave the connection_tags column blank. The city_tags column should still contain at least one matching city_key from data/cities.csv.
